task_description: Search for a specific artist, browse to their albums, and play the song "Father Figure."

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the large rounded Google search input field, specifically on the blank white text-entry area beneath the Google logo. In the full-screen view, Google Chrome is open on a new tab page in Chinese, with the Google logo centered, the search box in the middle, shortcut icons below it, and the browser toolbar across the top.
caption.action: Click the Google search box in the center of the page.
caption.expectation: The search field should become active with a text cursor, ready for typing.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the centered Google search field active with the typed query "spotify" visible in the white rounded input box, with the text cursor at the end of the word. A suggestion panel is open directly below, showing entries including "spotify - Google 搜索," "Spotify" with the green Spotify logo, and other related suggestions like "spotify web," "spotify download," and "spotify login." The full-screen image shows the Google homepage in Chrome, with the large Google logo above the search box, links such as Gmail and 图片 in the top-right, and the browser window maximized.
caption.action: Type "SPOTIFY" into the Google search box, appending the letters so the query reads "spotify."
caption.expectation: The search term should appear in the active search field and Google should update the autocomplete suggestions related to Spotify.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the Google search area with a semitransparent red X over the lower portion of the search interface, while the full-screen view makes clear that the Google homepage is open in Chrome with the query "spotify" already entered in the centered rounded search box. An autocomplete panel is expanded below, with the top highlighted suggestion reading "spotify - Google 搜索," followed by a green Spotify logo entry labeled "Spotify" and additional suggestions such as "spotify web," "spotify download," and "spotify login."
caption.expectation: Google should submit the current search for "spotify" and open the search results page.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the purple underlined search result title text "Spotify - Web Player: Music for everyone," which is a clickable link object in the results list. The full-screen view shows a Google results page for "spotify" in Chrome, with the Spotify result at the top including the green Spotify icon, the spotify.com URL, and several sitelinks below such as Download Spotify, Search, and Mobile Web Player.
caption.action: Click the purple underlined result title "Spotify - Web Player: Music for everyone."
caption.expectation: The selected search result should open, navigating the browser to Spotify's website or web player page.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the Spotify top search field, specifically over the placeholder text in Chinese inside a rounded dark search box with a magnifying-glass icon on the left and keyboard shortcut hints on the right. In the full-screen view, Spotify Web Player is open in Chrome with the home page visible, a left sidebar for the library, recommended playlists in the center, and the now playing panel on the right. The target is a top-bar UI control.
caption.action: Click the top search box with the magnifying-glass icon and the Chinese placeholder text.
caption.expectation: The search field should become active and ready for text entry, likely placing a text cursor in the box or opening the search view.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop shows the Spotify search field at the top center as an active rounded dark bar with a magnifying-glass icon on the left and the typed query "taylor swif" visible inside, indicating text is being entered into the search box. Below it, a dark autocomplete panel is open with suggestions including "taylor swift," "taylor swift playlist," and "taylor swift top 50 songs," plus artist and track results. In the full-screen view, Spotify Web Player is open in Chrome in Chinese, with navigation and library content on the left, recommendation tiles in the center, and a now-playing panel on the right showing "Father Figure" by Taylor Swift.
caption.action: Type "TAYLOR SWIFT" into the active Spotify search field, completing or replacing the current partial query.
caption.expectation: The search text should update to the full artist name, and the autocomplete suggestions/results should refresh to match Taylor Swift.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the Spotify search bar with the full query "taylor swift" entered, with a semitransparent red X over the text area. Directly below, an autocomplete panel is open showing suggestions such as "taylor swift," "taylor swift top 50 songs," and "taylor swift playlist," along with an artist result for Taylor Swift. In the full-screen view, Spotify Web Player is open in Chrome with the dark interface, the search field at the top center, library options on the left in Chinese, recommendation tiles in the middle, and a now-playing panel on the right showing "Father Figure" by Taylor Swift.
caption.expectation: Spotify should submit the search and open the search results page for Taylor Swift instead of only showing autocomplete suggestions.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop shows a semitransparent red X placed over a plain dark empty area, not on any visible button, text label, album tile, or list item. In the full-screen view, Spotify search results for "taylor swift" are open in Chrome. The top has category chips, the center-left shows a large artist card for Taylor Swift under 热门结果, the center-right shows song results, and the right sidebar shows the currently playing track. The X aligns with blank dark background space in the main results area above and between content sections, indicating a click on a blank region rather than a specific control.
caption.action: Click the blank dark background area in the main Spotify results pane.
caption.expectation: No major navigation should occur; any hover state or focus from another element may clear, while the Taylor Swift search results page remains visible.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop shows the full Spotify artist page with no red X, consistent with a scroll action. The center panel displays Taylor Swift's artist header image with her name in large white text, monthly listener count beneath it, playback and follow controls, and the beginning of the 热门 section listing songs such as The Fate of Ophelia, Opalite, and Cruel Summer. In the full-screen view, Chrome is open to Spotify in Chinese, with the left sidebar for library and playlist creation, the main artist page in the middle, a right sidebar showing the currently playing track Father Figure and an 关于艺人 panel, and the playback bar at the bottom. The scroll target is the main artist content area, and the intended direction is downward to view more of the artist page below the visible top section.
caption.action: Scroll down in the main Spotify artist page content area.
caption.expectation: The page should move downward, revealing content below the current top header and popular tracks section, such as more songs, releases, or additional artist details.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the album section titled 唱片目录 with filter chips beneath it. A semitransparent red X is centered on the rounded gray chip labeled 专辑, which is between 热门新歌 and 单曲和 EP. In the full-screen view, Spotify is open in Chrome on the Taylor Swift artist page. The main content area shows album covers such as Opalite, The Life of a Showgirl, Lover, and reputation, with the player bar at the bottom and a right sidebar showing the currently playing track Father Figure. The target is a UI control in the main content area.
caption.action: Click the 专辑 filter chip in the discography section.
caption.expectation: The 专辑 chip should become selected, and the discography list should refresh to show album releases under the album category.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a song row in Spotify’s track list with a semitransparent red X centered on the track title area for “Father Figure,” shown in green text, with the artist name “Taylor Swift” beneath it and an explicit-content badge beside the artist line. A dark tooltip visible to the left reads “播放 Taylor Swift 的 Father Figure,” indicating this row will play that song. In the full-screen view, Chrome is open to the Spotify album page for “The Life of a Showgirl + Acoustic Collection.” The main center panel lists tracks, and the “Father Figure” row is highlighted in the album track list. The click target is an object in the content list, specifically the song row.
caption.action: Click the “Father Figure” track row in the album’s song list.
caption.expectation: The selected song should start playing or become the active track, with the row remaining highlighted and the player updating to that song.
